system.effect: Casting Time: Commune With the Gods requires 2d6 turns to cast. It cannot be channeled. The sorcerer enters a trance and reaches out to the Greater Powers or Spirits, who will answer three yes-or-no questions. The being contacted may or may not be omniscient but will provide truthful answers. The sorcerer may cast this spell at most once per week.
system.critSuccess: The being will answer 6 questions rather than 3.
